economic_notes: Band controls 100% of Gwaalagaa Naay Corporation, Taaw Naay Enterprises Ltd., and Haida Expeditions Ltd. Investment in Taaw Naay Enterprises is nil value. Investments reported using modified equity method.
notes: Investments in three wholly-owned entities (Gwaalagaa Naay Corporation, Taaw Naay Enterprises Ltd., Haida Expeditions Ltd.) are accounted for using modified equity method rather than consolidation — these are treated as GBEs. Ottawa Trust Funds of $891,111 held by ISC on behalf of the Band are classified as financial assets but also as restricted/equity. Contingent liabilities include guarantor of Band member mortgages to $5,627,858. Wages and benefits from segment disclosure totaling $1,169,310. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNHA + Ottawa Trust + CMHC + Parks Canada = 8133083+2152071+24755+22912+428000-945 rounding = 10760821 approximated as 10760766 per segment revenue from Government of Canada line.
